top_signals.title: Labour has become the party of welfare, not work
top_signals.summary: A generous interpretation of events would be to concede that Labour has avoided any attempt at welfare reform because it’s been waiting for the conclusions of Alan Milburn’s review into the crisis of youth unemployment. Milburn, who served as health secretary under Tony Blair, will publish the first part of his government-commissioned report this week, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
